{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Update .gitignore and verify final state","description":"After the other tasks complete:

1. Ensure the .gitignore from indy-mobileapps is in place at /Users/ggomes/dev/indy-frontend/mobile-apps/.gitignore
2. Add any additional entries needed:
   - .claude/
   - .mcp.json
   - .idea/
   - .playwright-mcp/
   - logs/
   - screenshots/ (root level, not dev-server/screenshots which is fine)
   - *.backup
   - test-results/
   - playwright-report/
   - diff.patch, patch.diff
   - Any other development artifacts

3. Verify final state of mobile-apps:
   - List all files and check nothing unnecessary remains
   - Check no AI/agent references exist in any tracked file
   - Confirm key files are present (configure-capacitor-app.sh, finalize-to-bundle.js, adjustment files, native plugins)
   - Confirm package.json has the right scripts
   - Make sure there are no stale references to brenden theatres specifically (should be generic)","assignedBy":"verifier","timestamp":"2026-03-06T17:56:30.084Z"}
